commands.review_summary:
The PR extracts session display helpers into a shared UI module, routes Overview recent-session rows through that resolver, and adds Overview render coverage plus a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main has a clear source-level reproduction: an Overview recent-session row with both `displayName` and `label` renders `displayName` first at `ui/src/ui/views/overview-cards.ts:247`; I did not run the browser path because this review is read-only.
